atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports an ulcer on his right foot.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports the ulcer has been present for approximately six to eight weeks.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports the ulcer developed approximately six to eight weeks ago.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports the ulcer has not been going away.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports the ulcer has appeared to worsen.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports occasional numbness in his feet.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports frequent tension headaches.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports he quit smoking approximately four years ago.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports he smoked at least two packs per day for twenty years.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports he is currently managing his diabetes with insulin.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports his sugars have been running higher than normal.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies chest pain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies shortness of breath.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Physical examination reveals a two by three centimeter ulcerated lesion on the right lateral foot near the fifth metatarsal-metatarsophalangeal joint.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: There is no associated cellulitis.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The wound demonstrates granulation tissue.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The wound demonstrates some purulent discharge.

atomic_propositions.speaker: unknown
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Vital signs are unremarkable.

atomic_propositions.speaker: unknown
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Blood pressure is 127/78 mmHg.

atomic_propositions.speaker: unknown
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Heart rate is 62 beats per minute.

atomic_propositions.speaker: unknown
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Temperature is 98.6°F.

atomic_propositions.speaker: unknown
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Dorsalis pedis and posterior tibial pulses are palpable.

atomic_propositions.speaker: unknown
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Jugular venous distension is absent.

atomic_propositions.speaker: unknown
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Carotid bruits are absent.

atomic_propositions.speaker: unknown
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Lungs are clear to auscultation bilaterally.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Heart sounds are normal with a two out of six systolic ejection murmur heard at the left base.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: A non-healing ulcer of the right foot, likely secondary to underlying diabetic neuropathy and vascular insufficiency.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician orders an arterial ultrasound of the lower extremities.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician plans a podiatry consult for wound care management.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes aspirin daily.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician plans a follow-up appointment in four weeks.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician plans a referral to a vascular surgeon.
